info.name: Assured Express Full API
info.description: Complete endpoint coverage for auth/core/comms + docs/schema endpoints with request tests and variable chaining.

exec: if (body.access) pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', body.access); if (body.refresh) pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', body.refresh); if (body.user && body.user.id) pm.collectionVariables.set('user_id', String(body.user.id));
const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('vertical_id', String(rows[0].id));
const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('zone_id', String(rows[0].id));
const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('rider_id', String(rows[0].id));
const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('merchant_id', String(rows[0].id));
const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('order_id', String(rows[0].id));
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const rows = Array.isArray(body) ? body : (body.results || []); if (rows.length && rows[0].id) pm.collectionVariables.set('notification_id', String(rows[0].id)); }
